items.title: Berkshire Hathaway: Load Up While The Market Ignores
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway is deploying its $344B cash pile into undervalued stocks like UnitedHealth, while trimming Apple and BAC. See why BRK.A stock is a buy.

items.title: Vulcan Value Partners Q2 2025 Letter
items.description: Vulcan Value Partners navigated Q2 volatility with disciplined repositioning into discounted, stable-value stocks. Explore their strategy and portfolio moves now.

items.title: Investing.com’s stocks of the week
items.description: Investing.com -- It has been a very positive week for U.S. equities as earnings season winds down, with the S&P 500 hitting a new high. While Friday saw traders take some gains off the table, stocks appear poised to close the week higher.

items.title: IHF: Attractive U.S. Healthcare Valuations Amid Sector's Recovery
items.description: IHF offers exposure to large-cap healthcare, AI-driven growth, and demographic trends, with a recent dip creating a strong entry point. See why IHF ETF is a buy.

items.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Intel, UNH, Rigetti — And All Eyes On Powell
items.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.
